nasb.text: and it will come about, while My glory is passing by, that I will put you in the cleft of the rock and cover you with My hand until I have passed by.

esv.text: and while my glory passes by I will put you in a cleft of the rock, and I will cover you with my hand until I have passed by.

cnv.text: 我的榮耀經過的時候，我要把你放在磐石隙中，我要用我的手掌遮蓋你，直到我過去了。

ccb.text: 我的荣耀经过你面前的时候，我会先把你安置在石缝里，用我的手遮掩你，直到我从你面前走过。
